Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Run targeted concurrent claims, workers, caches, cancellation, pool shutdown, and handler tests under the race detector with goroutine and resource completion checks.

For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Race Leak Evidence model · Theory Feed Go Race Leak Evid…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: The race detector proves there are no deadlocks or leaks.
